scripts.build: npm run build:shared && npm run build:web && npm run build:server && npm run build:electron && npm run build:mobile
scripts.dev:electron: concurrently -k -n web,server,electron "npm run dev:web" "npm run dev:server" "wait-on tcp:3000 && npm run dev --workspace @opencursor/electron"
scripts.dev:mobile: concurrently -k -n server,mobile "npm run dev:server" "npm run dev --workspace @opencursor/mobile"
scripts.lint: npm run lint --workspace @opencursor/web && npm run lint --workspace @opencursor/client-sdk && npm run lint --workspace @opencursor/electron && npm run lint --workspace @opencursor/mobile && npm run test --workspace @opencursor/server
